overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit cityscape. The character crosses streets and sidewalks in a bright sunny environment featuring palm trees, elevated highways, and towering glass skyscrapers with digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city intersection with digital billboards

events.description: black SUV drives past from right to left while crossing

agents.ego_description: crossing the street from right to left through the crosswalk

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving across the intersection

entered.detail: massive digital display with red background and white corporate logo mounted on building facade
tall modern building with reflective glass and purple neon signage
tropical palm trees lining the street
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a futuristic city intersection with bright sunlight illuminating towering glass buildings. The character crosses the street through a marked crosswalk, passing palm trees and digital billboards while a black SUV drives through the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with stone facade building

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a stone wall building

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in brown jacket walking in same direction ahead

entered.detail: building with dark textured stone block facade and planters
large pink and purple neon sign reading DREAM on building exterior
massive curved elevated highway structure with multiple levels
tall black pole with glowing cyan light panels

segments.scene_description: Walking along a concrete sidewalk beside a building with a distinctive stone block facade. A large pink neon sign reading DREAM is visible on the left, while ahead looms a massive elevated highway interchange. Palm trees line the path and futuristic street lamps with cyan lighting stand on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching highway interchange with mountain view

events.description: quest notification UI appears indicating nearby side job objective

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk approaching the elevated highway structure

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in suit carrying briefcase walking toward camera

entered.detail: distant mountain range visible beyond the highway structure

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the sidewalk with the stone wall building now further to the left. The elevated highway loop grows larger in the frame, and a distant mountain range becomes visible in the background. Various pedestrians walk in opposing directions, and a quest marker appears on the UI.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection under elevated highway with mountain backdrop

events.description: crossing the street under the massive elevated highway interchange
turning left to look down the street toward the city center

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection under the highway loop then turning to observe the surroundings

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians waiting at the crosswalk corner

entered.detail: tall skyscraper with reflective glass facade and horizontal neon lines

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the street beneath the massive curved highway interchange, with the mountain range visible in the distance. After crossing, the camera turns left to reveal a view down a palm-lined street toward additional glass skyscrapers, while the highway structure looms overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a sun-drenched futuristic city that transitions from a bustling intersection to the shadow of a massive highway interchange. It begins by crossing a bright street lined with palm trees and digital billboards as a black SUV passes through the intersection. As the camera moves onto a concrete sidewalk, the scene shifts past a stone block facade and a glowing pink DREAM sign toward a looming elevated highway loop. The perspective then expands to reveal a distant mountain range and passing pedestrians before the camera moves beneath the curved concrete structure of the interchange. Finally, the shot turns left to look down a palm-lined street toward towering glass skyscrapers while the highway remains overhead.
